message:
test(umask): expand from 18 to 29 tests for UmaskSaver (wa-37jwb)

New tests: individual permission bits (owner/group/other), rapid
create-drop cycles with changing masks, saved_umask state transitions,
triple-nested savers, permission category sweep, end-to-end
preservation, global state clearing verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
